info.title: AUCA IMS API
info.description: API documentation for AUCA IMS backend

tags.name: Dynamic Fee Structures
tags.description: Manage dynamic fee structures per term and academic unit

tags.name: Exam controller
tags.description: Manage the exams and exam timetables

tags.name: Course controller
tags.description: Manage courses offered by AUCA, change codes, add new course, remove, change name, ...

tags.name: API Keys
tags.description: Manage API keys for external system integration

tags.name: Course Lecturer Assignment
tags.description: Endpoints for assigning courses to lecturers

get.summary: Get a term using the id, if not provided give the active (current) term

get.description: Query max credits by semester/program (paginated)

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number (1-based). Defaults to 1.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Number of items per page. Defaults to 10. Max 200.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort fields in format 'field:direction' comma-separated. Example: 'name:asc,createdAt:desc'. Available directions: asc, desc.

schema.description: Sort fields in format 'field:direction' comma-separated, e.g. 'name:asc,createdAt:desc'

get.description: Get a room by name

post.description: Create a new room

put.description: Switch student to another group for a course
Student switches to another group for a course in their own registration

put.summary: Update a fee structure and its items

get.description: Fetch a user by username

put.description: Update an existing user, except password

post.description: Create a new user

put.description: Remove a permission from a user

post.description: Add a permission to a user

get.description: Fetch staff details by username

post.description: Create a new staff member

get.description: Retrieve ban details by id

post.description: Create a ban record for a user

get.summary: Get exam details based on the term and the exam type (Mid or final)

post.summary: Create an Exam. Add exam details

get.description: Get course by code

put.summary: update course code, and register old code, in old code table

get.description: Get academic unit by code

post.summary: HoD validates a registration for their department
Does registration, preregistration must be done previously for this to work properly

post.description: Add a course to a student's registration
Administrative add of course to registration
Student adds a course to their own registration
Upload Excel workload to create offered courses

post.summary: Upload attendance excel template to batch record attendance

200.description: Excel attendances safely pushed to database

post.summary: Save structured daily attendance (Frontend bulk save tool)

post.description: Saves a single instance of a student's payment and automatically recalculates their balance. (Used by payment system)

200.description: Payment saved and balance recalculated successfully

post.summary: Recalculate balance for a specific student
post.description: Forces the system to recalculate and aggregate total registration fees and payments for a given student.
Endpoint for the payment system to notify AUCA of status changes.

200.description: Initiate payment, used by the student only to start a payment process

post.description: Triggers a system-wide recalculation of the financial balances for all students with recorded payments.
Accepts a list of student payments, saves them all, and recalculates corresponding balances. ((Used by payment system))

get.summary: Get fee structure by academic unit

post.summary: Create a fee structure with items
Batch create fee structures for multiple academic units

post.description: Add multiple permissions to multiple users at once

get.description: Fetch a student by studentId

post.description: Create a new student
Create multiple students at once
Kicks off background suspension (and ban) of all eligible students. Returns the list of IDs being processed; updates apply asynchronously in batches.

200.description: Background job started; eligible IDs returned

post.description: Kicks off background graduation of all eligible students. Returns the list of IDs being processed; updates apply asynchronously in batches.

200.description: Background job started; eligible IDs returned

post.description: Upload an Excel file to create students in bulk
Create multiple staff members
Updates the currently authenticated user's password. Requires current password for verification.

post.summary: Create new user [for student Only], role will be overwritten

post.description: Authenticates the user and sets access/refresh tokens in HTTP-only cookies.
Resets the user's password using the OTP received by email.
Refreshes the access token using a valid refresh token cookie. Rejects banned users.

401.description: Invalid refresh token or user banned

post.description: Clears authentication cookies and invalidates the session.
Sends a password reset link to the user's email. Always returns 200 to avoid email enumeration.

200.description: Reset email sent if account exists

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all API key metadata. Raw keys are never included.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number (1-based). Defaults to 1.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Number of items per page. Defaults to 10. Max 200.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort fields in format 'field:direction' comma-separated. Example: 'name:asc,createdAt:desc'. Available directions: asc, desc.

schema.description: Sort fields in format 'field:direction' comma-separated, e.g. 'name:asc,createdAt:desc'

post.description: Creates a new API key for an external system. The raw key is returned ONLY once.
Immediately invalidates an API key. This action is permanent (soft-revoke).
Grant a course waiver to a student

409.description: Waiver already exists for this student and course

post.description: Record a course completed at another institution

post.summary: Map transfer course to AUCA course
post.description: Map a transfer course to an AUCA course, automatically creating a waiver

404.description: Transfer course or AUCA course not found

delete.description: Remove a transfer course mapping, also removing the associated waiver

post.description: Add a prerequisite relationship between two bulletin courses

400.description: Invalid input or business rule violation (e.g., cycle detected, cross-bulletin)

delete.description: Remove a prerequisite relationship between two bulletin courses

post.description: Register that a course code is an old version of another course

status.description: Status of the course (empty, available, full, overflow)

items.description: List of fee items to associate with this structure

description.example: An introduction to database design and management

prerequisiteCodes.description: List of prerequisite course codes (DEPRECATED: use bulletin-level prerequisites)

prerequisites.description: Prerequisites map code->name (DEPRECATED: use bulletin-level prerequisites)

locked.description: Whether this course is locked (cannot be removed by student)

attendanceDate.description: Attendance date (defaults to today if omitted)

UrubutopayPaymentRequest.In.description: Internal DTO for initiating a payment via UrubutoPay. This is what the AUCA backend system sends to this gateway.

channelName.description: Payment channel to use. Allowed values: MOMO, AIRTEL_MONEY, CARD

feeType.description: Type of fee being paid. Allowed values: REGISTRATION_FEE, TUITION_FEE, STUDENT_CARD, etc.

DynamicFeeStructureBatchIn.description: Dynamic fee structure batch creation payload

targetCode.description: Academic unit code (Program, Faculty, or Department)

applyLevel.description: Level to apply the structure (PROGRAM, FACULTY, DEPARTMENT)

items.description: List of fee items to associate with these structures

usernames.description: List of usernames to apply permissions to

permissions.description: List of permission names to add/remove

WaiverIn.description: Input DTO for creating a course waiver

grantedBy.description: Username of staff who granted the waiver

grantedByName.description: Full name of staff who granted the waiver

TransferCourseIn.description: Input DTO for recording a transfer course

TransferCourseMappingOut.description: Output DTO for transfer course mapping

recordedBy.description: Username of staff who recorded the transfer course

recordedAt.description: Timestamp when transfer course was recorded

PrerequisiteIn.description: Input DTO for creating a prerequisite relationship

CourseVersionIn.description: Input DTO for registering an old course code

studentCount.description: Number of registered students in department

zeroCourseCount.description: Number of students with 0 courses in this department

pendingCount.description: Number of pending registrations in this department

studentValidatedCount.description: Number of student validated in this department

departmentValidatedCount.description: Number of department validated in this department

registrarValidatedCount.description: Number of registrar validated in this department

financeValidatedCount.description: Number of finance validated in this department

PayerInfo.description: Basic information about the payer (student) for payment processing and record-keeping.

GradeDetailDTO.description: Detailed grade information for a course
